description: Control Claude Chrome extension from Telegram - AI-to-AI desktop integration
pipeline: Telegram -> Clawdbot -> run_claude.py -> Chrome Claude Extension -> Response
key_breakthrough: Single Python process prevents focus stealing. All steps must run in ONE script.
what_this_unlocks: Any AI task on any webpage
rusty_quote: Give the bot the ability to see and use every tool like a regular user would be able to do.
